page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aan efficient program for refining multiple alignment of genomic sequences based on a phylogenetic tree. It has demonstrated significant improvements in the accuracy of alignments generated by several popular aligners.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Aan efficient program for refining multiple alignment of genomic sequences based on a phylogenetic tree. It has demonstrated significant improvements in the accuracy of alignments generated by several popular aligners.
